ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* The player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The pick number in the draft */,
  "country" TEXT /* The player's country of origin */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* The team the player is currently playing for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abv" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA, ABA) */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* The name of the home arena */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* The number of championships the team has won */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic was recorded in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "FG%" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3P%" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "FT%" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "ORB" REAL /* Offensive rebounds per game */,
  "DRB" REAL /* Defensive rebounds per game */,
  "TRB" REAL /* Total rebounds per game */,
  "AST" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "STL" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "BLK" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "TOV" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  "PF" REAL /* Personal fouls per game */,
  "PTS" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* The number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* The total minutes played by the team in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* The number of field goals made per game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* The number of field goals attempted per game */,
  "three_pointers_made" REAL /* The number of three-pointers made per game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" REAL /* The number of three-pointers attempted per game */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* The number of free throws made per game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* The number of free throws attempted per game */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* The plus-minus rating per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was won in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* The date the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_star_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game took place in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player played for */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* The location of the all-star game */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* The opposing team in the all-star game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* The result of the all-star game (Win, Loss) */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the player scored */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* The number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* The number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* The number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* The number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* The number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* The number of free throws attempted */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* The number of offensive rebounds */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* The number of defensive rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* The number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* The number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* The number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* The number of turnovers */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* The number of personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* The plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_star_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active (1) or inactive (0) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* The specific data or resource accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
